releaseNotes: Fixes the duplicate sleep records bug. Three changes shipping together: removed the 403 self-heal that was flipping already-synced sleep records back to unsynced (which then got re-POSTed and duplicated); added a process-wide lock around the unsynced-sleep-record sync path so concurrent sync attempts can't both POST the same row; and made POST /sleep-records idempotent — the client now sends a UUID on every save, so retries collapse server-side via ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING instead of spawning a new row each time. Also adds an admin diagnostics endpoint for cleaning up any leftover duplicate rows.
